title: Fusebase Flow hook event
description: The unified event shape that handlers in hooks/handlers/ accept on stdin. Different host providers (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) deliver slightly different shapes; the host-specific wrapper or shim normalizes to this schema before invoking the handler.

session_id.description: Stable identifier for the agent/IDE session. Used for audit log correlation.

cwd.description: Working directory at event time. Handlers compute git root from here.

host_tool.description: Which host invoked the hook. Handlers may adjust output format accordingly.

transcript_path.description: Path to the host tool's session transcript. Optional; some hosts don't expose it.

tool_name.description: For pre_tool_use / post_tool_use: the tool the agent is invoking (e.g., 'Bash', 'Edit', 'Write').

tool_input.description: For pre_tool_use / post_tool_use: the arguments the agent is passing to the tool. Shape depends on tool_name.

tool_output.description: For post_tool_use: the tool's output. Optional.

user_prompt.description: For user_prompt_submit: the operator's raw prompt text.

stop_reason.description: For stop: why the agent is signaling completion (e.g., 'task_complete', 'awaiting_user_input').

agent_message.description: For stop: the agent's final message to the operator. Used to detect 'done' / 'ready' claims.

compact_target.description: For pre_compact: what is being compacted (e.g., 'transcript').

permission_request.description: For permission_request: the pending permission ask details.
